title: Validating a Complex XML Schema
scenario: Generate a prompt that will instruct an LLM to produce an XML schema that validates a complex structured data type, including nested elements, attributes, and multiple namespaces. The schema should be under 200 lines of code, use the 'xs' namespace, and include a description of each element. Ensure the LLM output is syntactically correct and adheres to standard XML schema best practices.
constraints: Must be under 200 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated XML schema meets the constraints provided, including line count and namespace usage.
Verify that the generated XML schema is syntactically correct and free of errors.
Check if the generated XML schema accurately represents the complex structured data type, including nested elements, attributes, and multiple namespaces.
